summary: Declare missing opencode-safe-io workspace dependency in 6 packages that use it at runtime: opencode-model-router-x, opencode-plugin-preload-skills, opencode-dashboard-launcher, opencode-feature-flags, opencode-plugin-healthd, opencode-proofcheck. Also remove duplicate dependencies key introduced by rebase in opencode-learning-engine.
notes: These packages required opencode-safe-io at runtime but didn't declare it, causing MODULE_NOT_FOUND failures in package smoke tests. Fixed by adding workspace:* dep and running bun install. opencode-learning-engine had a duplicate dependencies key from rebase — removed the redundant trailing block.
